penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Task appears to show ongoing transfers but does not show all objects returned to original side.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows active peg transfer activity with instruments moving objects between sides of the board. However, the final frame shows the task is still in progress with objects remaining on both sides, indicating incomplete transfer back to the original configuration. Since maximum time appears to be reached without completion, this results in an automatic incomplete_task penalty and zero score.
